summary: Iteration 51 - Analytics Email Reports feature testing complete. All backend endpoints working (14/14 tests passed). Frontend UI verified: Admin Analytics Reports page renders correctly with period selector, preview/send buttons. Email preview loads with proper template. Settings page has Analytics Reports toggle in notifications section. Regression tests passed for referrals and promo codes pages.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login with admin@kalmori.com / MAYAsimpSON37!! returns access_token and user.role=admin
Backend: POST /api/admin/analytics-report/preview returns HTML and stats object (weekly)
Backend: POST /api/admin/analytics-report/preview returns HTML and stats object (monthly)
Backend: POST /api/admin/analytics-report/preview without auth returns 401/403
Backend: POST /api/admin/analytics-report/send returns sent_count (weekly)
Backend: POST /api/admin/analytics-report/send returns sent_count (monthly)
Backend: POST /api/admin/analytics-report/send without auth returns 401/403
Backend: GET /api/analytics-report/preferences returns weekly_report boolean
Backend: PUT /api/analytics-report/preferences updates and persists preferences
Backend: GET /api/analytics-report/preferences without auth returns 401/403
Backend: GET /api/referral/my-link still works (regression)
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns admin user (regression)
Frontend: /admin/analytics-reports page renders with title 'Analytics Email Reports'
Frontend: Period selector buttons (Weekly/Monthly) present and functional
Frontend: Preview button loads email HTML preview
Frontend: Send to All Artists button present
Frontend: Analytics Reports nav item visible in admin sidebar
Frontend: /referrals page renders with referral code KAL336CA7 (regression)
Frontend: Settings page Notifications tab has 'Analytics Reports' toggle
Frontend: /admin/promo-codes page loads (regression)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: GET /api/analytics-report/preferences returns only fields that were explicitly set. If monthly_report was never set, it's not returned. Consider always returning both fields with defaults for consistency.
seed_data_creation: None - clean database with only admin@kalmori.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51 tested Analytics Email Reports feature. Database is clean with 0 streams and $0 revenue which is expected. Admin can preview and send weekly/monthly performance reports to all artists. Users can toggle analytics report preferences in Settings > Notifications. SENDER_EMAIL is now support@kalmori.org. All endpoints require authentication. Admin endpoints require role=admin.

endpoints.POST /api/admin/analytics-report/preview: Returns HTML email preview and stats (total_streams, total_revenue, top_platforms, top_releases)
endpoints.POST /api/admin/analytics-report/send: Sends reports to all non-admin users, returns sent_count

frontend_pages./admin/analytics-reports: Admin page with period selector, preview button, send button, what's included section
frontend_pages./settings (Notifications tab): Analytics Reports toggle in email preferences
